steps.title: Convert minutes to hours
steps.content: The speed in miles per hour is distance divided by time in hours. Since $27$ minutes is $\frac{27}{60}$ hours, use $$\frac{13}{27/60}$$

steps.title: Round to the nearest tenth
steps.content: Compute the speed: $$\frac{13}{27/60}=\frac{13\cdot 60}{27}=\frac{780}{27}\sim 28.888\dots$$ Rounded to the nearest tenth gives the required value. The answer is 28.9.
